curation.synopsis: A young woman wakes to find herself the honoured guest of a courteous stranger in a candlelit hall whose silver service shows no reflection. Her host is a vampire of the Vyrkos line, gentle in manner and absolute in patience, and the question he is too polite to ask aloud hangs over every meal: will she take the Blood Kiss willingly, choose his darkness, become the bride he has decided she is? Footmen close the shutters when the sun rises. The food keeps coming. Each evening the conversation circles a little closer to the answer he expects, and her own resolve grows a little harder to find.
